title: Plugins
notice: This page currently focuses on two things: installing plugins and surfacing MCP-capable plugins. Broader plugin management can come later.

publicMcp.title: Public MCP Integrations
publicMcp.description: Pick a service card first, then use one-click setup from the detail page.
publicMcp.hint: One-click setup copies a ready-to-use template. Paste it into project .mcp.json or ~/.claude/settings.json.

status.checking: Checking MCP config for the current project...
status.detected: {{server}} was detected in the current project.
status.notDetected: {{server}} was not detected in the current project yet.
status.verificationHint: This checks whether the current workspace .mcp.json is wired up, not a live remote handshake.
status.workspaceHint: Open a thread workspace first to verify project-level MCP setup.
status.workspaceMissing: No workspace is currently available for verification.

figma.name: Figma
figma.summary: Official Dev Mode MCP for bringing Figma files, nodes, and layout context straight into your coding workflow.
figma.detailDescription: One-click setup writes the official remote MCP config into the current workspace. You can finish Figma auth the first time the tool runs.

steps.open: Click One-click setup to add figma to the current workspace .mcp.json
steps.copy: Complete the Figma OAuth flow the first time an MCP tool call is made
steps.paste: Share a Figma file, page, or node link in chat to start pulling design context

pencil.name: Pencil
pencil.summary: Design-to-code MCP integration for turning UI ideas into runnable code faster.
pencil.detailDescription: Click one-click setup to copy the template, then complete the final paste step.

steps.copy: Click Copy MCP config (or use the template below)

catalog.title: Plugin Install
catalog.description: Browse the OpenClaw plugins currently supported by MimiClaw and install them directly.

mcp.title: MCP Plugins
mcp.description: Quickly review plugins that expose MCP capabilities.

toast.connectedByCopy: One-click setup complete: template copied, paste it as instructed
toast.clipboardMcpInvalid: No valid MCP config found in clipboard. Please click Copy MCP config first.
